title: phyllactis pratensis
intro: Phyllactis pratensis, also known as Marsh Marigold, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Phyllactis pratensis include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce swelling and ease pain. Phyllactis pratensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
